---
title: "Welcome to my Data Science Portfolio"
description: "Expert en analyse de données, machine learning et visualisation"
lang: fr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
---

::: hero-banner
# Transform your data into strategic decisions

## And move faster than your competitors.

Specialized in data analysis, machine learning and interactive visualization, I can help you with your data science projects from A to Z.

[Discover my services](/services/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [View my portfolio](/portfolio/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::

## My Expertise

:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-4
### 📊 Data Analysis

Exploration, cleansing and statistical analysis of your data to reveal hidden patterns and generate actionable insights.
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### 🤖 Machine Learning

Development of predictive models and machine learning algorithms tailored to your business needs.
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### 📈 Visualization

Create interactive dashboards and engaging visualizations to effectively communicate your results.
:::
::::::

## Recent Projects

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Exemple de visualisation interactive avec plotly
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)

# Données d'exemple pour un projet
project_data <- data.frame(
  Projet = c("Analyse RH", "Prédiction Ventes", "Segmentation Client", "Optimisation Prix"),
  Secteur = c("RH", "Ventes", "Marketing", "Finance"),
  Impact = c(85, 92, 78, 88),
  Complexité = c(6, 8, 7, 9),
  Durée_semaines = c(4, 12, 8, 16)
)

# Graphique interactif avec hovertemplate corrigé
p <- plot_ly(project_data, 
             x = ~Complexité, 
             y = ~Impact, 
             size = ~Durée_semaines,
             color = ~Secteur,
             text = ~Projet,
             hovertemplate = paste0(
               "<b>%{text}</b><br>",
               "Complexité: %{x}<br>",
               "Impact: %{y}%<br>",
               "Durée: %{marker.size} semaines<br>",
               "<extra></extra>"
             )) %>%
  add_markers() %>%
  layout(title = "Vue d'ensemble de mes projets récents",
         xaxis = list(title = "Complexité (1-10)"),
         yaxis = list(title = "Impact (%)"),
         showlegend = TRUE)

p
```

[View all my projects →](/portfolio/)

## Latest Articles

<!-- The latest blog posts will be automatically listed here -->

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact-section
## Ready to collaborate?

I'd be delighted to discuss your project and see how my data science skills can help you achieve your goals.

[Contact me](mailto:contact-quarto-site.le77r@simplelogin.com){.btn .btn-primary} [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/arnaud-raulet-13308310/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

<!-- Configuration for babelquarto -->

```{=html}
<script>
// Ajout de fonctionnalités interactives si nécessaire
</script>
```
